tasks.prompt: The Enum field's by-name lookup incorrectly returns non-member attributes of the enum class (e.g., methods or properties) when looking up enum members by name. Fix the Enum field so that by-name lookup only returns actual enum members, not arbitrary class attributes, and add regression tests for accessing non-member enum attributes.
